message:
feat(dashboard): add VsockSession for vsock terminal protocol

Adds VsockSession type that wraps vsock connections and uses pkg/shell
protocol for terminal communication with VMs. This is the host-side
component that will replace SSH-based terminal sessions.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
